value: Modern Mountain Living Above the Meadow

Perched on a private ridge in Big Sky's coveted Cascade neighborhood, 538 Outlook Trail is a study in warm contemporary design and effortless indoor-outdoor living. Walls of glass frame uninterrupted views of Lone Peak and the Spanish Peaks, while reclaimed timber, blackened steel, and honed stone lend a grounded, tactile warmth throughout. The open great room flows to a chef's kitchen with a waterfall island and professional appliances, and out to a wraparound deck with a private hot tub. A main-level primary suite, dedicated office, and a lower-level rec room with wet bar and bunk room make this an exceptional full-time residence or turnkey mountain retreat.

Cascade is one of Big Sky's most sought-after enclaves — a quiet, forested community minutes from the Town Center, world-class skiing at Big Sky Resort, and blue-ribbon fly fishing on the Gallatin River. Miles of trails connect directly to National Forest, and the neighborhood's elevated position captures panoramic sunset light across the entire range.
